hero.title: Journeys that awaken the senses
hero.subtitle: Discover France differently
hero.tagline: Tributrip — journeys that awaken the senses

intro.headline: Discover France differently
intro.lead: Each Tributrip experience invites you to slow down, meet people and discover the hidden treasures of our regions with authenticity and warmth.

experiences.title: Meet the Winemakers of Gers
experiences.description: Immerse yourself in the world of passionate winemakers and discover the secrets of the Gascony terroir.

experiences.title: Contemplative Walk in the Armagnac Countryside
experiences.description: Gentle walks through rolling landscapes, moments of contemplation and renewal.

experiences.title: Cycling Adventure in Gascony
experiences.description: Explore country lanes by bike, between bastides and authentic villages.

experiences.title: Immersion with a Potter
experiences.description: Live at the pace of the craftsman, learn techniques and take home your creations.

categories.title: Chill
categories.desc: Relaxation, contemplation and renewal in the heart of nature.

categories.title: Yummi
categories.desc: Local flavors, gourmet encounters and culinary traditions.

categories.title: Adventure
categories.desc: Outdoor activities and active discovery of the region.

categories.title: Immersion
categories.desc: Local life, traditional crafts and learning local skills.

artisans.name: Pierre Dubois
artisans.quote: Each bottle tells the story of our terroir. With Tributrip, I share this passion with curious travelers who become friends.

artisans.name: Marie Lartigau
artisans.quote: Our farm is a place of life where each vegetable grows with love. Hosting Tributrip travelers is sharing our art of living.

artisans.name: Jean-Claude Martin
artisans.quote: The clay of Gers holds secrets I've passed on for 30 years. My hands guided by tradition create unique pieces.

artisans.name: Sophie Bernadotte
artisans.quote: My bees forage wild flowers of Gascony. Their golden honey carries the sweetness of our landscapes.

contact.headline: Let's create your trip together

whatsapp.label: Direct WhatsApp
whatsapp.desc: Contact us instantly for a quick reply

contact.base: At the heart of Gers, between Auch and Condom

newsletter.title: Tributrip Newsletter
newsletter.desc: Receive our travel stories, artisan portraits and secret tips

footer.about: A slow tourism agency based in Gers, we create authentic experiences that reveal the human and cultural richness of our regions.
